strings.MOFFEINHERETIC_STATBONUSITEM_PICKUP: Accipe ingens incrementum potentiarum... <color=#FF7F7F>SED salus tua cum tempore minuitur.</color>
strings.MOFFEINHERETIC_STATBONUSITEM_DESC: Auge <style=cIsHealing>salutem</style> per <style=cIsHealing>400%</style> et <style=cIsDamage>damnum</style> per <style=cIsDamage>50%</style>. Minue <style=cIsHealing>fundamentalem sanitatis recuperationem</style> ad <style=cIsHealing>-6hp/s</style>.
strings.MOFFEINHERETIC_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Haereticus <style=cIsUtility>velocius movetur</style> et potest <style=cIsUtility>alas bis plaudere</style> pro maiore altitudine in aere.
strings.MOFFEINHERETIC_SKILL_LUNAR_SPECIAL_REPLA: Inferendo damnum addit cumulum <style=cIsDamage>Ruin</style>. Activatio facultatis <style=cIsDamage>detonat omnes cumulorum Ruinae</style> in distantia infinita, inferens <style=cIsDamage>300% damni</style> plus <style=cIsDamage>120% damni</style> per unum cumulum <style=cIsDamage>Ruinae</style>.
strings.MOFFEINHERETIC_SKILL_LUNAR_SECONDARY_REP: Opprime globum laminarum qui continenter infert <style=cIsDamage>175% damni</style>. Post dilationem explode et <style=cIsDamage>eradica</style> omnes hostes, inferens <style=cIsDamage>700% damni</style>.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINHERETICUNLOCK_DESCRIP: Effuge a luna ut superstes arcanus.
